schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

theory.canonical_statement:
cells.append(new_markdown_cell("## DAT-GPT / QOV summary

Brief summary of the model equations:

- Kuramoto phase field: $$\dot\varphi_i = \omega_i + \frac{1}{N}\sum_j K_{ij}\sin(\varphi_j-\varphi_i) + \eta_i(t).$$
- Bessel-harmonic weighted creation rate: $$\lambda_i(t) = \lambda_0 \sum_n J_n(\kappa)^2 S_{i,n}(t) [1+\beta R_i(t)].$$
- Creation -> density: $$\partial_t n = \lambda - \Gamma n + D_n \nabla^2 n.$$ 
- Emergent potential (proxy): use -\nabla n or solve Poisson: $$\nabla^2 \Phi = 4\pi G_{eff} \rho, \; \rho = m_0 n.$$"))
theory.technical_interpretation: Physical Constants: dotφ_i is a series / summation, written dotφ_i = ω_i + (1)/(N)∑_j K_ijsin(φ_j-φ_i) + η_i(t).. It is expressed as a sum or series over modes or indices, superposing discrete contributions. It is built from N, j, K_ij, defining dotφ_i. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
